brief: Maintainer cockpit highlights one priority cluster around onboarding friction, CI confusion, and repeated docs questions.

outputNotes.triage summary: The summary gives one clear maintainer view before diving into every issue thread.
outputNotes.priority tags: Priority tags help maintainers act without reading raw exports.
outputNotes.semantic issue memory: This matters when multiple maintainer records need to be searched together instead of one at a time.
outputNotes.maintainer digest: The digest turns triage into something shareable across sessions and handoffs.

searchSummary: Onboarding friction, CI confusion, repeated docs questions.
whyItMatters: Maintainer memory is useful only when there is more than one record to compare. Search makes repeated issues visible across triage cycles.
searchIntro: Search the seeded maintainer set to see how the same cockpit can surface repeated pain points instead of leaving each export isolated.

brief: This triage export clusters release regressions around packaging drift, workflow flakiness, and broken install assumptions after publish changes.
searchSummary: Packaging drift, workflow flakiness, install regressions.
whyItMatters: With multiple triage records, semantic memory starts to show whether a maintainer problem is local or part of a broader recurring pattern.

brief: This export shows support-heavy traffic around API assumptions, setup confusion, and duplicate how-do-I questions that belong in docs instead of roadmap threads.
searchSummary: Support noise, API assumptions, duplicate setup questions.
whyItMatters: Multiple seeded records let the cockpit demonstrate clustering and retrieval, not just a one-off markdown output.
